Deploy

  • Documentation site
RGC Circuit Simulator
  • Documentation site
  • View page source

Documentation site

The RGC Circuit Simulator documentation is built with Sphinx using the Read the Docs theme. As a user of the simulator you don’t need to build or deploy the docs: the HTML site is already hosted for you.

If you’re viewing the source tree locally and want to read the docs offline, build them once with:

pip install -r docs/requirements.txt
cd docs
sphinx-build -b html . _build/html

Then open _build/html/index.html in your browser.

Previous
